---
title: "Website build and deployment"
toc: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
---

The project has a "Quarto face" and a "pkgdown reference behind it".

## Outputs

- Quarto renders into `docs/` (root pages, kernels, workflows, vignettes).
- pkgdown renders into `docs/pkgdown/`.

## Navigation

- Quarto navbar is controlled by `website/_quarto.yml`.
- The Quarto "Reference" item should link into `pkgdown/reference/index.html`.

## Recommended checks before pushing

1. Quarto render succeeds and `docs/index.html` loads.
2. pkgdown builds without missing topics.
3. Internal link graph has no broken links and no unexpected new orphans.
